mapper.nql: MATCH (v) WHERE id(v) in ${ids} RETURN id(v) as id , tags(v) as tagList,properties(v).NAME as NAME;
GET SUBGRAPH 1 STEPS FROM "${vertexId}" YIELD VERTICES AS nodes, EDGES AS relationships;
GET SUBGRAPH 1 STEPS FROM "${vertexId}" OUT YIELD VERTICES AS nodes, EDGES AS relationships;
Find ${qu.queryType} path from "${qu.startId}" to "${qu.endId}" over ${qu.edgeNameList} ${qu.direction} UPTO ${qu.stepInterval} STEPS YIELD path AS p;
